nasb.text: Beat your plowshares into swords And your pruning hooks into spears; Let the weak say, “I am a mighty man.”

esv.text: Beat your plowshares into swords, and your pruning hooks into spears; let the weak say, “I am a warrior.”

cnv.text: 要把犁頭打成刀劍， 把鐮刀打成矛槍； 軟弱的要說： ‘我是勇士。’

ccb.text: 要将犁头打成刀剑， 把镰刀铸成矛头， 软弱的人也要做勇士！
